title: Progress security advisory (AV26-552)
description: Between June 2 and 4, 2026, Progress published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products. Included was a critical update for the following:
products: Sitefinity CMS and Sitefinity Insight  multiple versions
Progress Kemp LoadMaster  version GA v7.2.63.1 and prior
Progress Kemp LoadMaster - version LTSF v7.2.54.17 and prior
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
